scripts.graphs:ax: uv run python plot_ax_results.py --input out/harness-ax-large-results.json --out-dir out/graphs
scripts.graphs:top5: uv run python plot_ax_results.py --input out/harness-ax-top5-results.json --out-dir out/graphs/top5
scripts.graph:conversation: uv run python plot_conversation_heatmap.py --input out/harness-ax-large-results.json --conversation private_c01 --source deterministic --method roberta_emotion --window-size 16 --stride 8 --chart line --out out/graphs/private_c01_emotion_line.png
scripts.graph:conversation:heatmap: uv run python plot_conversation_heatmap.py --input out/harness-ax-large-results.json --conversation private_c01 --source deterministic --method roberta_emotion --window-size 16 --stride 8 --chart heatmap --out out/graphs/private_c01_emotion_heatmap.png
scripts.graph:conversation:llm: uv run python plot_conversation_heatmap.py --input out/harness-ax-conversation-results.json --conversation private_c01 --source llm --llm-run conversation_qwen_all_16x8_prior_summary --window-size 16 --stride 8 --chart line --out out/graphs/private_c01_llm_emotion_line.png
scripts.graph:conversation:llm:heatmap: uv run python plot_conversation_heatmap.py --input out/harness-ax-conversation-results.json --conversation private_c01 --source llm --llm-run conversation_qwen_all_16x8_prior_summary --window-size 16 --stride 8 --chart heatmap --out out/graphs/private_c01_llm_emotion_heatmap.png
scripts.harness:quick: uv run python harness.py --config harness.quick.json --out out/harness-quick-results.json
scripts.harness:providers: uv run python harness.py --config harness.provider.json --out out/harness-provider-results.json
